roa.docketEntryComment: Warrant Discharged
Bench Warrant Issued

/CAL:TEMPORARY MODIFICATION OF GPS ORDER/NP/DAWT/CTORD:GPS MAY BE MODIFIEDAS FOLLOWS/EMMOD:GPS BRACELET MAY BE REMOVED ON THE MORNING OF FRIDAY, SEPTEMBER 4, 2020 AND DEFENDANT MUST RETURN TO 70 OAK GROVE ON MONDAY, SEPTEMBER 7, 2020 NO LATER THAN 4 PM (1600 HOURS) TO BE RE-FITTED WITH A GPS BRACELET/X:NEXT COURT DATE OF 09-29-20 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:TS DA MTR AND PC 4011,6 REPROT FOR BHC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/DEF:TO SUBMIT DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED; NOT POSSESS ANY WEAPONS; NOT CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL-MARIJUANA; NOT CONSUME ANY REGULATED AND OR CONTROLLED SUBSTANCEWITHOUT A PRESCRIPTION; CAN NOT TRAVEL MORE THAN 50 DRIVING MILES WITHOUTPRIOR APPROVAL; ENGAGE ONLY IN PRE-APPROVED ACTIVITIES SUCH AS AA 3X PERWEEK; ACTIVITIES PER ACM; ATTEND COUNSELING-GROUPS AS DIRECTED; ABIDE BY ANY STAY AWAY ORDER (CIVIL RO & CPO), /CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF/DOP/
/CAL:TS DA MTR/SHER2:09-30-19/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/X:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAMPURS PC 4011,6 FOR BHC/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:11-15-19/4011,5/CONTD:TO SETDA MTE & RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH5:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1Y /X: ZERO CTS/CTORD:1 YEARCJ SENTENCE IS STAYED PENDING SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF  30 DAY RESIDENTIALALCOHOL TREATMENT PROGRAM AT RECOVERY MANAGEMENT SERVICES IN CONCORD & THEFOLLOW UP INDIVIDUAL OUTPATIENT PLAN REQUIRED BY THE PROGRAM/X:IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLETE THE PROGRAM OR THE FOLLOW UP IOP, DEFENDANT WILL BE REMANDED TO SERVE THE 1Y CJ SENTENCE & WILL NOT RECEIVE ANY CRDIT FOR THE TIMESPENT IN THE PROGRAM, THE 1Y CJ SENTENCE WILL BE SERVED CONSECUTIVELY TO 1Y CJ SENTENCE IN #18014573/OR/CTORD:REPORT TO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM UPON RELEASE FROM CUSTODY/WS/WEAP/RESTR/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/X:PROBATION SENTENCE IN THIS CASE IS TO RUN CONCURRENT WITH #18014573/ /OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/DOP/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT RE RESIDENTIALTREATMENT PROGRAM/
